title: BEAM Therapeutics Stock Surge on Strategic Financing Deal
text: Beam Therapeutics stock surged 14% following announcement of the $500 million strategic financing facility with Sixth Street. The non-dilutive financing structure provides the company with significant financial flexibility to support commercialization of ristoglogene autogetemcel (risto-cel) and advance its pipeline of precision genetic medicines. The facility includes $100 million funded at close with up to $300 million available based on clinical, regulatory and commercial milestones. Terms include approximately 10% annual interest rate with no scheduled amortization and principal due at maturity in early 2033. The financing eliminates near-term equity dilution concerns and extends the company's cash runway into mid-2029 to execute across all pipeline priorities including risto-cel commercialization, BEAM-302 pivotal development for AATD, BEAM-304 IND filing for PKU, and BEAM-301 development for glycogen storage disease.
